@graph.name: 27Tools
@graph.description: 27Tools is a growing collection of fast, simple online tools that run in the browser.

@graph.name: 27Tools | Fast, Simple Online Tools
@graph.description: Browse online tools from 27Tools, including PNG to WEBP conversion, Sony, Canon, and Nikon shutter count checks, HEX to RGB colour conversion, and Unix timestamp conversion.

@graph.name: About 27Tools
@graph.description: Learn more about 27Tools, the thinking behind it, and the goal of building useful tools that are fast and simple.

@graph.name: Privacy Policy | 27Tools
@graph.description: Read the 27Tools privacy policy to understand what limited information may be collected and how the website is operated.

@graph.name: PNG to WEBP

@graph.name: Unix Timestamp Converter
@graph.browserRequirements: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
